category_sources: Official OpenFst homepage describes a library for constructing, combining, optimizing, and searching weighted finite-state transducers.
source_facts.description: Library for weighted finite-state transducers
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official OpenFst TWiki WebHome.
docs_sources: Official Doxygen page provides OpenFst API documentation.
Official OpenFst homepage provides background material, quick tour, advanced usage, extensions, examples, glossary, downloads, and documented source code.
repo_sources: Official OpenFst homepage provides documentation and tarball downloads, but no official source-control repository URL was identified from official sources.
tags_sources: Official OpenFst homepage lists applications including speech recognition and synthesis, machine translation, OCR, pattern matching, string processing, and information retrieval.
source_facts.executables lists many FST command-line tools.
